evals.prompt: Choose a palette, typography pair, spacing rhythm, and chart color sequence for this quarterly review deck. We do not have an existing design system yet.
evals.expected_output: Routes to design-foundations because the deliverable is broad visual guidance for a visual artifact and there is no project-specific token system yet.

evals.prompt: Turn our brand brief, product notes, and reference sites into a reusable design-token spec in docs/reference/design.md, and document any conflicts you resolve.
evals.expected_output: Routes to generating-design-tokens because the main output is a reusable token spec with traceable design decisions.

evals.prompt: Design a safe schema-driven browser renderer so the model can compose cards, forms, and action panels from tool output without touching privileged app code.
evals.expected_output: Routes to generative-ui because the hard problem is model-generated browser UI with renderer boundaries and safe output contracts.

evals.prompt: Prototype an Apple-like liquid glass search field in Chromium using CSS/SVG refraction, a displacement map, and a controllable specular rim highlight.
evals.expected_output: Routes to liquid-glass-design because the request is explicitly about a narrow experimental glass-effect implementation.

evals.prompt: Our agent chat product needs a calmer visual style, but the real blocker is that the model must stream structured UI cards and forms into the browser safely. Figure out the right design lane.
evals.expected_output: Routes to generative-ui because the hard problem is still streamed model-generated browser UI even though the prompt also mentions visual style.
